case_title: KELLIE JIANG et al VS. ANNIE CLAIRE PENNELL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-02-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-02-2011 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE FILED BY JIANG, KELLIE PENNELL, ANNIE CLAIRE
REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT PENNELL, ANNIE CLAIRE
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF JIANG, KELLIE WU, WOON CHIUNG AS TO DEFENDANT PENNELL, ANNIE CLAIRE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-05-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PENNELL, ANNIE CLAIRE
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL GRANTED. -JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL-
ORDER ON JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S DECLARATION RE:REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 116.850. REQUEST GRANTED. -JUDGE DONALD S MITCHELL-
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY JIANG, KELLIE WU, WOON CHIUNG AS TO DEFENDANT PENNELL, ANNIE CLAIRE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-03-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT PENNELL, ANNIE CLAIRE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JIANG, KELLIE WU, WOON CHIUNG WU, SAU WAI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PENNELL, ANNIE CLAIRE $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,585.00, THE COURT FINDS THAT THERE WAS A COLLISION AND THAT DEFENDANT WAS AT FAULT. PLAINTIFF DID NOT SUBSTANIATE ALL OF HER ACCIDENT RELATED COSTS OR PROVE THAT ALL WERE INCURRED AS A RESULT OF THE ACCIDENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-03-2012 ORDERED DESTROYED
DECLARATION OF JUDGMENT DEBOR REGARDING SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT. FILED BY DEFENDANT PENNELL, ANNIE CLAIRE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-03-2011 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUN-02-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-02-2011 - JUDGMENT.
